profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Topindo Solusi Komunika Tbk engages in the sale of digital products in Indonesia. It operates in three segments: Digital Product, Fast Moving Consumer Products, and Ballroom and Hotel. The company offers digital products, such as credit top-ups, data packages, PLN tokens, payment point online bank, and e-money. In addition, the company engages in payment solution services; and online-to-offline platform, as well as ballroom and hotel. PT Topindo Solusi Komunika Tbk is headquartered in Singkawang, Indonesia.
